semantics.name: broadcast_control
semantics.label: Broadcast
semantics.description: Negative control: broadcast presence semantics; edge choice never enters the carrier.

semantics.name: committed_allocation
semantics.label: Committed Allocation
semantics.description: Positive control: variable-to-edge assignment with disjoint-domain segment composition on the V-hypergraph.

semantics.name: pair_phase_exclusive_other_live_block_lower
semantics.label: Pair Phase XL
semantics.description: Pair phase mod 2 triggered only by exclusive claims into a live pair.

semantics.name: pair_phase_shared_other_live_block_lower
semantics.label: Pair Phase SL
semantics.description: Pair phase mod 2: a shared claim into the lower edge toggles when the upper edge is already live; odd phase suppresses lower completion.

semantics.name: pair_phase_any_other_live_block_lower
semantics.label: Pair Phase AL
semantics.description: Pair phase mod 2: any claim into a pair edge toggles once the opposite edge is already live; odd phase suppresses lower completion.

semantics.name: pair_phase_shared_other_live_block_lower__simplex_orient_two_live
semantics.label: Shared Pair Phase + 2-Live Orient
semantics.description: Pairwise shared-other-live phase toggles and suppresses lower completion. A triangle-orientation token records which edge created the second live edge of a 2-simplex and blocks that oriented edge on completion.

semantics.name: pair_phase_shared_other_live_block_lower__simplex_orient_three_live
semantics.label: Shared Pair Phase + 3-Live Orient
semantics.description: Pairwise shared-other-live phase toggles and suppresses lower completion. A triangle-orientation token records which edge completed the live 2-simplex and blocks that oriented edge on completion.

semantics.name: pair_phase_shared_other_live_block_lower__simplex_orient_second_or_third
semantics.label: Shared Pair Phase + 2/3-Live Orient
semantics.description: Pairwise shared-other-live phase toggles and suppresses lower completion. Triangle orientation updates on the second or third live edge and blocks the oriented edge on completion.

semantics.name: pair_phase_shared_other_live_block_lower__simplex_commutator_toggle
semantics.label: Shared Pair Phase + Commutator Toggle
semantics.description: Pairwise shared-other-live phase toggles and suppresses lower completion. A simplex phase toggles when two active pair phases meet inside a live triangle; odd phase blocks the lowest edge.

semantics.name: pair_phase_shared_other_live_block_lower__triangle_debt
semantics.label: Shared Pair Phase + Triangle Debt
semantics.description: Pairwise shared-other-live phase toggles and suppresses lower completion. Triangle-local debt accumulates when pair transport reaches a full triangle; debt level 2 blocks the lowest edge.

semantics.name: pair_phase_shared_other_live_block_lower__feedback_orient_freeze_pairs
semantics.label: Shared Pair Phase + Feedback Orient
semantics.description: Pairwise shared-other-live phase toggles and suppresses lower completion. Triangle orientation updates on the second or third live edge while active simplex tokens freeze further pair updates on incident overlaps.
